case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH VS. JAMES PAYNE, AN INDIVIDUAL, ETC

docket_entries.description: MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPP OF MO FOR SUM ADJUDICTN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH ITS PORT COMMISSION
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLTF
SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS IN SUPP OF MO FOR SUM ADJUDICTN FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH ITS PORT COMMISSION

LAW AND MOTION 301, JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL. PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICAION REGARDING ITS CAUSES OF ACTION FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-21-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BY AND THROUGH ITS PORT COMMISSION AS TO DEFENDANT PAYNE, JAMES AN INDIVIDUAL DOING BUSINESS AS DOWNTOWN AUTO SALES SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

JUDGE BUSCH MADE A DISCLOSURE ABOUT HIS WIFE, CATHARINE BARNES, A DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY NOT INVOLVED IN THIS CASE AND THAT HE DOES NOT VIEW HER EMPLOYMENT AS A BASIS FOR RECUSAL.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICAION REGARDING ITS CAUSES OF ACTION FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(g). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 = (301/PJB)
